modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live phone call and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimally polite tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Issues with course selection and device functionality in eLumin Learning Lab

full_description_text: User cannot select a course in eLumin. Mouse and keyboard not working properly. They are using a virtual machine for learning off-campus. Need help with file copying too.

description: User cannot select a course in eLumin. Mouse and keyboard not working properly. They are using a virtual machine for learning off-campus. Need help with file copying too.
